chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeals No.352 to 355 of 2023 Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan & others Versus AGP Limited & others, The Searle Company Ltd. & others, Martin Dow Ltd. & others and Tabros Pharma Pvt. Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections and reply at “A” 2. For orders on exemption applications. 3. For hearing of main cases. 4. For orders on stay applications. Dated: 30.01.2024 None for appellants. Mr. Muhammad Inzimam Shareef for respondents. -.-.- These appeals impugn interim orders passed in the suits and no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellants. However, we have been informed by learned counsel for respondents that suits have now been dismissed and thus appeals have become infructuous. Perhaps for this reason no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellants. Be that as it may, since no one is in attendance on behalf of the appellants and there is not intimation either, these appeals are dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
